name: i8080 Mini-Computer (Banner)
author: Velxio
description: Self-contained Intel 8080 with an internal 328-byte ROM that prints a banner and then prints 'uptime ticks: 0xNN' every ~50 ms forever — using a real DCR/JNZ busy-wait. Wire TX/RX to an Arduino and open the Serial Monitor to watch the 8080 execute real instructions. Clean-room CPU validated by CPUDIAG.
